'''shoyafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eparterial|eparterial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eparterial|eparterial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoyafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyafithi|shoyafithi]] || [[word:shoyafiji|shoyafiji]] || [[word:shoyafishi|shoyafishi]] || [[word:shoyafiki|shoyafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyafuthuthu|shoyafuthuthu]] || [[word:shoyafujuju|shoyafujuju]] || [[word:shoyafushushu|shoyafushushu]] || [[word:shoyafukuku|shoyafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyafuthu|shoyafuthu]] || [[word:shoyafuju|shoyafuju]] || [[word:shoyafushu|shoyafushu]] || [[word:shoyafuku|shoyafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyafufthuf|shoyafufthuf]] || [[word:shoyafufjuf|shoyafufjuf]] || [[word:shoyafufshuf|shoyafufshuf]] || [[word:shoyafufkuf|shoyafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyafethe|shoyafethe]] || [[word:shoyafeje|shoyafeje]] || [[word:shoyafeshe|shoyafeshe]] || [[word:shoyafeke|shoyafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyafothotho|shoyafothotho]] || [[word:shoyafojojo|shoyafojojo]] || [[word:shoyafoshosho|shoyafoshosho]] || [[word:shoyafokoko|shoyafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyafotho|shoyafotho]] || [[word:shoyafojo|shoyafojo]] || [[word:shoyafosho|shoyafosho]] || [[word:shoyafoko|shoyafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyafofthof|shoyafofthof]] || [[word:shoyafofjof|shoyafofjof]] || [[word:shoyafofshof|shoyafofshof]] || [[word:shoyafofkof|shoyafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyafïfthïf|shoyafïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfjïf|shoyafïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfshïf|shoyafïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfkïf|shoyafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyafïfthïfthïf|shoyafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfjïfjïf|shoyafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfshïfshïf|shoyafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfkïfkïf|shoyafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyafïfthïf|shoyafïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfjïf|shoyafïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfshïf|shoyafïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfkïf|shoyafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyafïfthïf|shoyafïfthïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfjïf|shoyafïfjïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfshïf|shoyafïfshïf]] || [[word:shoyafïfkïf|shoyafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoyafæthæ|shoyafæthæ]] || [[word:shoyafæjæ|shoyafæjæ]] || [[word:shoyafæshæ|shoyafæshæ]] || [[word:shoyafækæ|shoyafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoyafathatha|shoyafathatha]] || [[word:shoyafajaja|shoyafajaja]] || [[word:shoyafashasha|shoyafashasha]] || [[word:shoyafakaka|shoyafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoyafatha|shoyafatha]] || [[word:shoyafaja|shoyafaja]] || [[word:shoyafasha|shoyafasha]] || [[word:shoyafaka|shoyafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoyafafthaf|shoyafafthaf]] || [[word:shoyafafjaf|shoyafafjaf]] || [[word:shoyafafshaf|shoyafafshaf]] || [[word:shoyafafkaf|shoyafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoyafasha|shoyafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyafshësha|shoyafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyafrosha|shoyafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyafmusha|shoyafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyafyasha|shoyafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyafnkshësha|goshoyafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyafnkrosha|goshoyafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyafnkmusha|goshoyafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyafnkyasha|goshoyafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shoyayafasha|shoyayafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyayafshësha|shoyayafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyayafrosha|shoyayafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyayafmusha|shoyayafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyayafyasha|shoyayafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyayafnkshësha|goshoyayafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyayafnkrosha|goshoyayafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyayafnkmusha|goshoyayafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyayafnkyasha|goshoyayafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sheyæfasha|sheyæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sheyæfshësha|sheyæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sheyæfrosha|sheyæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sheyæfmusha|sheyæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sheyæfyasha|sheyæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosheyæfnkshësha|gosheyæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosheyæfnkrosha|gosheyæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosheyæfnkmusha|gosheyæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosheyæfnkyasha|gosheyæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shoyfafasha|shoyfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoyfafshësha|shoyfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoyfafrosha|shoyfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoyfafmusha|shoyfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoyfafyasha|shoyfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoyfafnkshësha|goshoyfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoyfafnkrosha|goshoyfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoyfafnkmusha|goshoyfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoyfafnkyasha|goshoyfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
